zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Annesley II於1378年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾沃拉亞斯頓時，他的父親Sir Hugh Annesley14歲，母親Benedicta de Babington18歲。他於1405年與Clara FitzWilliam在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1435年享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Annesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ansley
meanings: habitational name from such places as Ansley in Warwickshire or Annesley in Nottinghamshire. The former is named with Old English ānsetl ‘hermitage’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’; the latter with an Old English personal name An (‘the solitary one’) + lēah. In North America, the surname may in some cases also be an altered form of Scottish Ainslie . Compare Ainsley .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Annesley II was born in 1378, in Wollaston, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Hugh Annesley, was 14 and his mother, Benedicta de Babington, was 18. He married Clara FitzWilliam in 1405, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1435, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Annesley II est né en 1378, à Wollaston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Annesley, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Benedicta de Babington, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Clara FitzWilliam en 1405, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1435, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Annesley II 1378 in Wollaston, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Annesley 14 und seine Mutter Benedicta de Babington 18. Er hat 1405 in Nottinghamshire, England Clara FitzWilliam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1435 im Alter von 57 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Annesley II è nato il nel 1378 nel Wollaston, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Annesley, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Benedicta de Babington, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Clara FitzWilliam nel 1405, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1435, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Annesley IIが1378年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウオラストンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Annesleyは14歳，母Benedicta de Babingtonは18歳であった。1405年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでClara FitzWilliamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1435年に57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Annesley II(이)가 1378년 영국 노르섬프토실르 울라스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Annesley(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Benedicta de Babington(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1405년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Clara FitzWilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Annesley II nasceu em 1378, em Wollaston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Annesley, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Benedicta de Babington, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Clara FitzWilliam em 1405, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1435, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Annesley II родился в 1378 г. в местности волластон, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Annesley было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Benedicta de Babington, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Clara FitzWilliam в 1405 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1435 г. в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Annesley II nació en 1378, en Wollaston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Annesley, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Benedicta de Babington, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Clara FitzWilliam en 1405, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1435, a la edad de 57 años.
